summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Commission page and Earnings Scale features. All 7 backend API tests passed (100%). All UI tests passed - verified Commission page with 3 summary boxes, consultant selector, income goal input, commission boxes, deal tables, PDF export, and Earnings Scale editor in User Management.
critical_code_review_comments: Commission calculations are correct: basic_salary + debit_commission + cash_commission + bonuses = earnings_mtd
Earnings Scale structure properly stored and retrieved from user document
Difference box color coding works correctly: green when goal reached, red when not
Assistant dashboard endpoint returns deal counts (not values) as specified
PDF export uses jsPDF with landscape A4 format
seed_data_creation: Earnings scale was pre-configured for Joanthan: basic_salary=5000, debit tiers=[100,150,200,250], cash tiers=[5,10,12,15,20]%, bonuses=(club_incentive=500, top_seller=1000)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Commission page fully functional. Earnings Scale editor is inside Edit User modal (Settings > User Management > Edit consultant). No deals exist in current period so commission calculations show 0 for debit/cash. The income goal is stored per user per period in commission_goals collection.

features_verified.commission_page_visible_in_sidebar: PASS - Commission nav item present for admin/consultant
features_verified.three_summary_boxes: PASS - Earnings MTD, My Goal, Difference cards present
features_verified.difference_box_color_coding: PASS - Green when goal reached, red when not
features_verified.debit_deals_table: PASS - Columns: Date, Client Name, Client Number, Joining Fee, DO Value, Units, Term
features_verified.cash_deals_table: PASS - Columns: Date, Client Name, Client Number, Cash Deal Value, Units, Term
features_verified.settings_user_management_earnings_scale: PASS - data-testid='earnings-scale-section' in Edit User modal
features_verified.bonuses_section: PASS - Club Incentive, Special Bonus, Add Incentive button
features_verified.api_commission_get: PASS - Returns correct commission data with calculations
features_verified.api_dashboard_assistant_stats: PASS - Returns deal counts, appointment trend, today appointments
